name: build-flutter-apps
description: Official Flutter and Dart agent skills with the Dart/Flutter MCP server for AI-assisted app development.

interface.shortDescription: Build, test, and fix Flutter apps with official Dart and Flutter skills.
interface.longDescription: Adds the official Flutter and Dart agent skills from flutter/skills and dart-lang/skills, plus MCP configuration for the official Dart/Flutter MCP server.
defaultPrompt: Build this Flutter feature using the official Flutter and Dart skills.
Fix the current Flutter analyzer errors using the Dart/Flutter MCP server where available.
Add tests for this Flutter feature using the official testing skills.
